title: Hookdeck Connection
description: JSON Schema for the Hookdeck Connection entity, extracted from the Hookdeck Admin REST API (v2025-07-01).

name.description: Unique name of the connection for this source

full_name.description: Full name of the connection concatenated from source, connection and desitnation name

rules.description: Array of rules configured on the connection

updated_at.description: Date the connection was last updated

SourceCustomResponseContentType.description: Content type of the custom response

SourceTypeConfigGEMINI.description: The type config for GEMINI. Requires type to be `GEMINI`.

type.description: A deduplicate rule must be of type `deduplicate`

window.description: Time window in milliseconds for deduplicate

include_fields.description: Fields to include when generating deduplicate key. Supports root fields (e.g., "headers"), dot notation (e.g., "body.user.id"), array wildcards (e.g., "body.items[*].sku"), and array indices (e.g., "body.items[0].name"). Array notation must be followed by a property name.

exclude_fields.description: Fields to exclude when generating deduplicate key. Supports root fields (e.g., "headers"), dot notation (e.g., "body.user.id"), array wildcards (e.g., "body.items[*].sku"), and array indices (e.g., "body.items[0].name"). Array notation must be followed by a property name.

type.description: A retry rule must be of type `retry`

interval.description: Time in MS between each retry

count.description: Maximum number of retries to attempt

response_status_codes.description: HTTP codes to retry on. Accepts: range expressions (e.g., "400-499", ">400"), specific codes (e.g., 404), and exclusions (e.g., "!401"). Example: ["500-599", ">400", 404, "!401"]

SourceTypeConfigHTTP.description: The type config for HTTP. Requires type to be `HTTP`.

type.description: A delay rule must be of type `delay`

type.description: A transformation rule must be of type `transform`

transformation_id.description: ID of the attached transformation object. Optional input, always set once the rule is defined

name.description: The unique name of the transformation

code.description: A string representation of your JavaScript (ES6) code to run

env.description: A key-value object of environment variables to encrypt and expose to your transformation code

transformation.description: You can optionally define a new transformation while creating a transform rule
